items.title: ‘Manic impulsiveness’ drives SpaceX-fueled retail risk complex
items.summary: The result was a market struggling to settle on a single narrative, with investors lurching between macroeconomic developments and speculative trades
items.titleZh: “躁狂冲动”导致SpaceX推动的零售风险复杂化
items.summaryZh: 其结果是，市场难以确定单一的叙述，投资者在宏观经济发展和投机交易之间摇摆不定

items.title: Why TD Securities anticipates even bigger days ahead for SpaceX
items.summary: Peter Haynes, TD Securities' head of index and market structure, suggests SpaceX's public debut is only a small part of the larger SpaceX timeline.
items.titleZh: 为什么道明证券预计SpaceX未来的日子会更大
items.summaryZh: 道明证券指数和市场结构主管Peter Haynes表示，SpaceX的首次公开亮相只是SpaceX更大时间表的一小部分。

items.title: Justice Department seizes websites that published deepfake nudes of famous women
items.summary: The DOJ says the domains were used to publish digitally forged nude and sexual images and videos of women without their consent. According to the Justice Department, the material involved thousands of "digital forgeries," while the US Attorney's Office for Ne…
items.titleZh: 司法部查封了发布著名女性深度假裸体的网站
items.summaryZh: 美国司法部表示，这些域名被用于在未经女性同意的情况下发布数字伪造的裸体和性图像和视频。根据司法部的说法，这些材料涉及数千件“数字伪造品”，而美国国家检察官办公室…

items.title: More and more of Musk’s companies end up under the same roof. Here’s a look at his sprawling empire
items.summary: He still holds the CEO role at several corporations today, in addition to other various executive titles or ownership stakes.
items.titleZh: 越来越多的马斯克的公司最终都在同一个屋檐下。下面来看看他庞大的帝国
items.summaryZh: 除了其他各种高管头衔或所有权股份外，他至今仍在几家公司担任首席执行官。

items.title: Super-sized slot cars: these HD electric machines NEVER need plugged in
items.summary: A Kalmar Ottawa T2 EV electric terminal tractor has been successfully deployed on an in-road charging system in Ljungby, Sweden, enabling continuous operation without ever needing to be plugged in.
items.titleZh: 超大老虎机：这些高清电机永远不需要插电
items.summaryZh: 卡尔玛渥太华T2电动终端拖拉机已成功部署在瑞典永比的道路充电系统上，无需插电即可连续运行。

items.title: SpaceX IPO sticks the landing. Here's what investors are saying about its epic first trading day
items.summary: Despite a large retail allocation and huge volume, volatility was moderate
items.titleZh: SpaceX首次公开募股成功着陆。以下是投资者对其史诗般的第一个交易日的评价
items.summaryZh: 尽管零售配置庞大，交易量巨大，但波动性适中

items.title: Saylor to Musk: Thanks to you, 25% of 'Mag8' firms now hold bitcoin
items.summary: Strategy chairman Michael Saylor congratulated Elon Musk on SpaceX's historic Nasdaq debut Friday, coining the term "Mag8" and noting that 25% of the group now holds bitcoin on the balance sheet.
items.titleZh: Saylor对马斯克：多亏了你，25%的“Mag8”公司现在持有比特币
items.summaryZh: 战略主席迈克尔·塞勒（Michael Saylor）周五祝贺埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）在纳斯达克首次亮相，创造了“Mag8”一词，并指出该集团25%的人现在在资产负债表上持有比特币。

items.title: Moats vs. moonshots: The Warren Buffett-Elon Musk style debate
items.summary: In 2018, Warren Buffett and Elon Musk indirectly debated a key question that persists for modern investors.
items.titleZh: 呻吟与登月：沃伦·巴菲特与埃隆·马斯克式的辩论
items.summaryZh: 2018年，沃伦·巴菲特（Warren Buffett）和埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）间接讨论了现代投资者一直存在的一个关键问题。

items.title: A German Court Has Ruled That Google Is Liable for False Statements Generated by AI Overviews
items.summary: The ruling holds that a company that designs, trains, operates, and manages an AI system must assume legal liability for any damages caused by the responses it generates.
items.titleZh: 德国一家法院裁定，谷歌应对人工智能概述产生的虚假陈述负责
items.summaryZh: 该裁决认为，设计、培训、运营和管理人工智能系统的公司必须对其产生的反应造成的任何损害承担法律责任。

items.title: CoreWeave joins the Nasdaq-100 just 15 months after its IPO, capping a wild ride from crypto mining to AI darling
items.summary: CoreWeave, the AI cloud infrastructure company that began life as a New Jersey cryptocurrency mining operation called Atlantic Crypto, has been selected for inclusion in the Nasdaq-100 Index. The addition takes effect before market open on 22 June, just 15 mo…
items.titleZh: CoreWeave在首次公开募股仅15个月后加入纳斯达克100指数，标志着从加密货币挖矿到人工智能宠儿的疯狂旅程
items.summaryZh: CoreWeave是一家人工智能云基础设施公司，最初是一家名为Atlantic Crypto的新泽西加密货币挖矿公司，已被选入纳斯达克100指数。该补充条款在6月22日开市前生效，仅15个月…
